meaning: adj.不信宗教的,异端的n.无信仰者,异教徒,异端
examples: Do you take me for a fool infidel?
However, many Maliki jurists have forbidden a Muslim from granting power of attorney to an infidel in a dispute with another Muslim.
Joseph (of Egypt) took charge in an infidel nation, and he wasn't able to rule by all of the rulings of Islam.
And now, years on, the DEC curse has even reached out and poisoned the one part of the company that managed to escape and adopt the ways of the infidel.
